question: Show names of teachers and the courses they are arranged to teach in ascending alphabetical order of the teacher's name.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Course FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID ORDER BY T3.Name
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.identifier, T2.attr_046d47 FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T3 ON T1.instructor_key = T3.instructor_key JOIN course AS T2 ON T3.attr_046d47_key = T2.attr_046d47_key ORDER BY T1.identifier ASC;
raw_response: SELECT T1.identifier, T2.attr_046d47 FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T3 ON T1.instructor_key = T3.instructor_key JOIN course AS T2 ON T3.attr_046d47_key = T2.attr_046d47_key ORDER BY T1.identifier ASC;
